title: leptadenia lancifolia
intro: Leptadenia lancifolia, also known as the 'Jivanti' or 'Brewer's Ginger', is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Leptadenia lancifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or extract, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
